scripts.build:local: npm run sync-ids && anchor build -p reward_pool
scripts.deploy:local: npm run sync-ids && anchor deploy -p reward_pool
scripts.idl:init: anchor idl init $(anchor keys list | awk '/reward_pool/ {print $2}') -f target/idl/reward_pool.json
scripts.idl:upgrade: anchor idl upgrade $(anchor keys list | awk '/reward_pool/ {print $2}') -f target/idl/reward_pool.json
